name: Maintain current contact details
body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **maintain current contact details** across AWS.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment focuses on accounts with missing or outdated contact details. It reviews the identity, credential, role, or policy state that creates the access condition described by the control.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.

This control maps to a benchmark-style requirement, so the expected state should match the benchmark wording unless your organization has an approved exception.
description: Accounts with missing or outdated contact details
remediationDescription:
## AWS remediation
+
+### Console
+1. Sign in as the account root user.
+2. Open AWS Account settings.
+3. Update primary contact details (name, email, phone, address).
+4. Save and periodically re-validate details.
+
+### AWS CLI
+~~~bash
+aws account put-contact-information \
+  --contact-information file://contact-information.json
+~~~
+
+Example file:
+~~~json
+{
+  "FullName": "Security Team",
+  "AddressLine1": "Street 1",
+  "City": "City",
+  "StateOrRegion": "State",
+  "DistrictOrCounty": "County",
+  "PostalCode": "00000",
+  "CountryCode": "US",
+  "PhoneNumber": "+1-000-000-0000",
+  "CompanyName": "Example",
+  "WebsiteUrl": "https://example.com"
+}
+~~~
+
+### References
+- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/accounts/latest/reference/manage-acct-update-contact.html
+- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/reference/account/put-contact-information.html
